title: That Such Have Died Enables Us
content:
That such have died enables us
    The tranquiller to die;
    That such have lived, certificate
    For immortality.
meaning:
"That Such Have Died Enables Us" is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
